patient_summary: Patient Olivia, female, DOB 05/05/1952 (age 73), phone +13105561256. Active diagnoses documented include Mixeddyslipidemia-Primary; Essentialhypertension,benign; Legpain; Postoperativeanemia; Unspecifiedanemia; and Hyperlipidemiaassociatedwithtype2diabetesmellitus(CMS/HCC). Major recent procedure: COLONOSCOPY,WITH BIOPSY on 02/21/2025 (Haroon, Mustafa, MD). Key laboratory abnormalities (07/03/2023): Ferritin 266.8(H) ng/mL; Iron 41(L) ug/dL; IronSaturation 15(L)%; eGFRCKD-EPI 58(L) ml/min/1.73m2; Triglycerides 158(H) mg/dL; Chloride 108(H) mmol/L; AnionGap 5.0(L) mmol/L. Additional historic labs from 2020–2021 and infection history (MRSA 09/03/2020–09/04/2020; COVID-19 recovered 01/04/2021) are documented. Multiple care team members are listed across sites including Hand, Hoyet A, MD (PCP) and several Piedmont providers. Conflicts present in legal sex and DOB records and smoking history; sources preserved for reconciliation.
